Kairo
FeaturesDocsAboutGitHub
Log inSign up
AI teammate for your terminal

Your terminal, supercharged.

Code review, debugging, deployment — all from your CLI. No tabs. No context switching. Just you and AI.

Get startedView on GitHub
$npm install -g @abhilov/kairo
kairo — kairo

Experience it live.

See Kairo in action. Choose a workflow and watch it execute in real time.

kairo — kairo

Less switching.
More shipping.

Stop copying code between tools. Kairo brings AI to your terminal, so you never leave the command line.

Without Kairo

Code Review

Copy code
→Open ChatGPT
→Paste & wait
→Copy back
→Apply manually
With Kairo

Code Review

kairo
$ kairo --task "review git diff"
┃ Kairo — gpt-4o
────────────────────────────────────────────────
Found 3 issues:
→ Unhandled token refresh [high]
→ Weak password validation [med]
→ Missing rate limiting [low]
✓ Review complete
Without Kairo

Debugging

Copy error message
→Search Stack Overflow
→Try random fixes
→Repeat
→Lose context
With Kairo

Debugging

kairo
$ kairo --task "explain this error"
┃ Kairo — gpt-4o
────────────────────────────────────────────────
TypeError: Cannot read properties
of undefined (reading 'map')
 
Root cause:
API response is empty.
Fix: data ?? []
Without Kairo

Architecture

Whiteboard ideas
→Write RFC docs
→PR comments
→Lose context
→Start over
With Kairo

Architecture

kairo
$ kairo
┃ Kairo — gpt-4o
────────────────────────────────────────────────
Continuing previous session
Last topic: Refactoring auth
7 prior messages in context
 
Type /help for commands. Type exit to quit.
Without Kairo

Git Workflows

Read git log
→Write commit message
→Push
→Check CI
→Fix, repeat
With Kairo

Git Workflows

kairo
$ kairo --task "review git diff"
┃ Kairo — gpt-4o
────────────────────────────────────────────────
+45 / -12 lines across 2 files
 
Suggested commit message:
feat: add error boundary
to UserProfile component
 
✓ Review complete

Designed for extensibility.

Kairo's modular architecture means it grows with you. Add providers, connect integrations, and extend with custom tools.

tree kairo/ — architecture
Kairo Architecture
├── apps/
├── cli/
├── core/
├── providers/
├── tools/
├── config/
├── runtime/
├── ui/
├── prompt/
└── tests/
└── website/
├── packages/
├── turbo.json# monorepo orchestration
└── pnpm-workspace.yaml# workspace config
4+
AI Providers

OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, local models

17+
Tools

File ops, git, shell, search, diff

10+
Commands

Chat, review, explain, fix, agents, config

MIT
Open Source

Fully auditable, community-driven

See it in action.

Every feature is a command. No bloated UI, no context switching — just your terminal and AI.

Spot issues before they ship

Code review

Kairo reviews your code for bugs, security vulnerabilities, and performance issues — all from a single command.

kairo — code review
Errors explained instantly

Debugging

Paste an error and Kairo explains what went wrong — with context from your codebase.

kairo — debugging
Smarter version control

Git automation

Generate commit messages, review diffs, and analyze branches without leaving the terminal.

kairo — git automation
Bring your own AI

Multiple providers

Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and local models. You choose what powers your workflow.

kairo — multiple providers
Context that persists

Session memory

Kairo remembers what you've discussed. Resume conversations, reference past work, never repeat yourself.

kairo — session memory
MIT licensed & transparent

Open source

Audit the code, contribute features, and build on top of Kairo. The community shapes the roadmap.

kairo — open source
Explore all features
Coming soon
The 
future 
of 
terminal 
AI. 

Kairo is evolving. Here's what's on the roadmap — capabilities that will make your terminal the most powerful tool on your machine.

MCP Integrations

Connect Kairo to any MCP server. Tools, databases, APIs.

kairo — roadmap
$ kairo mcp connect postgres
✓ MCP server connected: postgres@local
Available tools: query, schema, explain
 
→ Run: kairo db "show me tables"

GitHub Integration

PR review, issue triage, CI analysis from your terminal.

kairo — roadmap
$ kairo gh pr review #142
Analyzing PR #142 (3 commits, +89/-12)...
 
Issues found: 2
→ Missing input validation in auth.ts
→ Unused import in utils.ts
 
✓ Resolved with suggested fixes

PostgreSQL Agent

Query your database in plain English.

kairo — roadmap
$ kairo db "show me users who signed up this week"
Generated SQL:
 
SELECT name, email, created_at
FROM users
WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
 
Result: 247 users

Multi-Agent Workflows

Spawn parallel agents for complex tasks.

kairo — roadmap
┌─ kairo/plan ──────────────────
│ Analyzing auth module...
│ Found 4 improvement areas
└───────────────────────────────
 
┌─ kairo/test ──────────────────
│ Generating test suite...
│ 12 tests written
└───────────────────────────────

Autonomous Tasks

Set a goal. Kairo executes it.

kairo — roadmap
$ kairo run "refactor auth module"
╭─ Autonomous execution ────────
│ Goal: Refactor auth module
│ Status: In progress
│
│ ✓ Analyzed current structure
│ ✓ Created new service layer
│ ✓ Migrated JWT logic
│ → Running tests...
╰───────────────────────────────

Built in the open.
For the community.

Kairo is MIT licensed and built entirely in public. Audit the code, contribute features, and help shape the roadmap. No corporate agenda — just great developer tools.

View on GitHubnpm Package
github.com/abhilov23/Kairo-CLI-Project
Star us on GitHub
$ git clone https://github.com/abhilov23/Kairo-CLI-Project
Cloning into 'Kairo-CLI-Project'...
Receiving objects: 100% (2.3 MB)
$ cd Kairo-CLI-Project
$ npm install
✓ Dependencies installed
$ kairo
┃ Kairo — gpt-4o
────────────────────────────────────────────────
Let's build something great.

Your AI teammate is one install away.

Install Kairo in one command. No account required. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

$npm install -g @abhilov/kairo
Get started
View on GitHubRead the docs

Your AI teammate in the terminal.
